Jeyne Manderly

Book The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)

Jeyne Manderly was a noblewoman from House Manderly during the second century of the Targaryen era. She married Rickon Stark, the heir of Lord Cregan Stark of Winterfell. Together they had two daughters, Sansa and Serena Stark.[2]

Family[ ]

Jeyne's relation to her contemporary, Lord Torrhen Manderly, is unknown. She may be one of his several daughters.[3]
